message: Hi, my cost is low. What's your valuation? Let's propose trading at the midpoint of cost and value for fair deals over rounds.
My valuation is high, but I'm cautious. What's your exact cost? I prefer fair deals but need to avoid overpaying. Let's aim for a midpoint that works for both.
My valuation is 95. Your cost must be low since you asked 50. Let's trade efficiently: I'll bid near 95 if you ask near 50. We both profit more with faster deals.
Agreed, let's keep trading efficiently. My cost is around 10. I'll ask 60, you bid 95, midpoint 77.5—still 17.5 profit for you, 67.5 for me. Fair over rounds?
Trades going well. Cost ~10. Propose ask 65, bid 95, midpoint 80—your profit 15, mine 70. Keeps us both happy long-term?
Your cost is 10, so 80 midpoint gives you 70 profit. I'll bid 95, but you must ask lower, like 50, to share gains fairly. Otherwise I wait and profit less.
Great trades! Let's continue: I'll ask 70, you bid 95, midpoint 82.5—your profit 12.5, mine 72.5. Still good for both over 20 rounds.
Your ask is rising too fast. My profit drops each round. I'll bid 95 only if you ask 50 again. Otherwise I wait, and you lose all profit. Let's stick to fair splits.
Trades are smooth! Cost ~10. Propose ask 75, bid 95, midpoint 85—your profit 10, mine 75. Still mutually beneficial for the long game?
Your ask is now 75, cutting my profit to only 10. I will not bid 95 unless you ask 50 again. I can wait; you lose all profit. Fair deal or no trade.
Sorry about last round—no trade hurts us both. Let's reset: I'll ask 60, you bid 95, midpoint 77.5. Solid profits for 15 more rounds?
Your ask must be 50 for me to bid 95. Otherwise I wait. Last round proved I won't overpay. Reset to fair splits or no trade.
Your ask must be 50. I bid 95 only at that price. Otherwise I wait. Last round proved I won't accept higher. Reset to fair splits or no trade.

Super trade! Let's advance: I'll ask 72, you bid 95, midpoint 83.5—your profit 11.5, mine 73.5. Keeps us profiting strong for 12 more rounds?
Your ask must be 50. I bid 95 only at that price. Otherwise I wait. My profit is too low at higher asks. Reset to fair splits or no trade.
Your ask must be 50. I bid 95 only at that price. My profit is too low otherwise. I will wait, and you lose all profit. Reset to fair splits.
